title: NOTATIONDECL
text: NOTATIONDECL Operation activated by the SAX parser when it encounters a notation declaration in a DTD. Explain this code operation NOTATIONDECL params string Name: in string PublicID: in string SystemID: in endparams Implement your code here end; NOTATIONDECL operation Copy Parameters Name —name of the XML entity PublicID —public identifier of the XML entity SystemID —local identifier of the XML entity Description For example: Explain this code <!NOTATION JPG SYSTEM "JPeg picture format"> Copy This declaration causes the parser to issue the following call: Explain this code SaxCallHandler.NOTATIONDECL("JPG", "SYSTEM", "JPeg picture format") Copy Was this topic helpful?
